channel.title: _jacobking TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from _jacobking

item.title: PEA FRITTERS 🫛 written recipe below 👇🏾 Even though the proteins in peas are easier to digest than meat, they’re cheap and high in fibre they do not get the love they deserve 🙏🏾 Here we’ve made a quick, healthy snack paired with a light dip makes for a p
item.description: PEA FRITTERS 🫛 written recipe below 👇🏾 Even though the proteins in peas are easier to digest than meat, they’re cheap and high in fibre they do not get the love they deserve 🙏🏾 Here we’ve made a quick, healthy snack paired with a light dip makes for a p

item.title: 🚨NEW @Kallø FLAVOUR🚨 ad Their NEW Sweet Chilli Veggie Cakes are ✨ sensational ✨ just like the rest of their range which I scran all the time, particularly the Beetroot + Balsamic Veggie Cakes 🤝 Find them now at @Waitrose & Partners @Ocado @Morrisons | Gr

item.title: GARLICKY DIP 🧄 written recipe below 👇🏾 Garlic is everyone’s favourite aromatic, it’s; deep, rich and when cooked slowly in olive oil it goes all soft and buttery, the perfect base of this delicious dip! 😋 👇🏾ingredients👇🏾 -around 30 to 40 cloves of garli
item.description: GARLICKY DIP 🧄 written recipe below 👇🏾 Garlic is everyone’s favourite aromatic, it’s; deep, rich and when cooked slowly in olive oil it goes all soft and buttery, the perfect base of this delicious dip! 😋 👇🏾ingredients👇🏾 -around 30 to 40 cloves of garli

item.title: CREAMY ONE POT MUSHROOM PASTA 🍝 written recipe below 👇🏾 You don’t need a long list of ingredients and a complicated recipe to make comforting meals, with; one pot, a handful of pantry staples and a few minutes (about 20) you can make something super satis

item.title: The most authentic vegan Chinese food in 🇬🇧 @TofuVeganlondon Flying in chefs from the regions the dishes originate from is the reason the food here is so authentic and one of the best places for Chinese food in London, vegan or not 🤝 Chinese mock meats
item.description: The most authentic vegan Chinese food in 🇬🇧 @TofuVeganlondon Flying in chefs from the regions the dishes originate from is the reason the food here is so authentic and one of the best places for Chinese food in London, vegan or not 🤝 Chinese mock meats

item.title: LEMON PEPPER POTATO POPS 🥔 written recipe below 👇🏾 Potatoes really are everyone’s favourite carb and they are best when crispy and golden 😋 here they have a gooey centre, with a crunchy/craggily shell! 😋 👇🏾ingredients👇🏾 -6 large white potato -1 tsp gar

item.title: CRISPY SPROUT + POTATO SALAD 🥔 written recipe below 👇🏾 Some people really don’t like Brussel sprouts but when you smash them along with some potatoes and then bake them, they go SO CRUNCHY! Pair that with this light, creamy dressing and you’re in for a t

item.title: TOFU SKIN ROAST CHICKEN 🐔 written recipe below 👇🏾 I am always hearing how ‘there is no protein in plants’ well can somebody tell me why dried tofu skin actually has more protein than the most protein dense meat available; chicken 👀 With some dried varie
item.description: TOFU SKIN ROAST CHICKEN 🐔 written recipe below 👇🏾 I am always hearing how ‘there is no protein in plants’ well can somebody tell me why dried tofu skin actually has more protein than the most protein dense meat available; chicken 👀 With some dried varie

item.title: COCONUT HORCHATA 🇲🇽 written recipe below 👇🏾 I stopped drinking alcohol around 4 years ago and around this time every year, although I am tempted by the festivities and fun; I am always reminded of how grateful I am for removing alcohol from my life! My r

item.title: Many people falsely claim that tofu is unhealthy for you whilst completely ignoring the peer reviewed, science back studies that prove the environmental and health benefits it provides when compared to meat 🤝🏾 Meat might have more protein but is linked t
item.description: Many people falsely claim that tofu is unhealthy for you whilst completely ignoring the peer reviewed, science back studies that prove the environmental and health benefits it provides when compared to meat 🤝🏾 Meat might have more protein but is linked t

item.title: The intense focus on protein is worrying, as the other important macronutrients are often over looked 😭 Our bodies need a mixtures of; carbs, fats, fibre and protein to function, they are as important as each other and you can easily consume enough of al
item.description: The intense focus on protein is worrying, as the other important macronutrients are often over looked 😭 Our bodies need a mixtures of; carbs, fats, fibre and protein to function, they are as important as each other and you can easily consume enough of al

item.title: Carbs are not ‘unhealthy’ and they don’t ’make you fat’, they’re the bodies primary source of energy so make sure you eat more legumes like these caramelised onion lentils which you can find in my book (link in bio) 🤝🏾 #recipe #lentils #healthy #carbs #c
item.description: Carbs are not ‘unhealthy’ and they don’t ’make you fat’, they’re the bodies primary source of energy so make sure you eat more legumes like these caramelised onion lentils which you can find in my book (link in bio) 🤝🏾 #recipe #lentils #healthy #carbs #c

item.title: baked black bean tacos, find the full recipe in my book (link in bio) ❤️ We seriously need to eat less animal products, the over bearing strain it is placing on the planet is to much to ignore; they’re destroying our rainforests, emptying our oceans and
item.description: baked black bean tacos, find the full recipe in my book (link in bio) ❤️ We seriously need to eat less animal products, the over bearing strain it is placing on the planet is to much to ignore; they’re destroying our rainforests, emptying our oceans and

item.title: More beans + tofu = more life + longevity, so try these bean/tofu mince chilli recipe from my book (link in bio) ❤️ #recipe #food #beans #healthy #cooking
item.description: More beans + tofu = more life + longevity, so try these bean/tofu mince chilli recipe from my book (link in bio) ❤️ #recipe #food #beans #healthy #cooking

item.title: Red meat and dairy are just as bad as ultra processed foods, instead of eating either, try; simple, satisfying whole foods recipes like this butternut squash daal which you can find in my book (link in bio) ❤️ #recipe #food #cooking #healthy #curry
item.description: Red meat and dairy are just as bad as ultra processed foods, instead of eating either, try; simple, satisfying whole foods recipes like this butternut squash daal which you can find in my book (link in bio) ❤️ #recipe #food #cooking #healthy #curry

item.title: Less meat + more legumes = a longer healthier life, so eat more bean based recipes like this cacio e pepe white beans which you can find in my book (link in bio) ❤️ #recipe #food #healthy #beans #cooking
item.description: Less meat + more legumes = a longer healthier life, so eat more bean based recipes like this cacio e pepe white beans which you can find in my book (link in bio) ❤️ #recipe #food #healthy #beans #cooking

item.title: LENTIL MEATBALLS 🫘 written recipe below 👇🏾 A.I’s every growing water use is definitely worrying but as the animal agriculture industry uses 200,000x more water, land and resources then this should also be a concern too! By eating a whole foods, plant bas
item.description: LENTIL MEATBALLS 🫘 written recipe below 👇🏾 A.I’s every growing water use is definitely worrying but as the animal agriculture industry uses 200,000x more water, land and resources then this should also be a concern too! By eating a whole foods, plant bas

item.title: People mistake needing protein with needing to eat meat but what we actually need is a mix of; protein, fibre and carbs which is exactly what you get in these baked black bean tacos, find the full recipe + much more in my book (link in bio) ❤️ #recipe #t
item.description: People mistake needing protein with needing to eat meat but what we actually need is a mix of; protein, fibre and carbs which is exactly what you get in these baked black bean tacos, find the full recipe + much more in my book (link in bio) ❤️ #recipe #t

item.title: 50% of your daily calories should be taken up by carbs but to make that healthy, tasty and easy to achieve you can make recipes like these caramelised onion lentils - find the full recipe in my book (link in bio) ❤️ #recipe #cooking #lentils #beans #heal
